output.answer:
<tool_call>
{"name": "execute", "arguments": {"kg": "wikidata", "sparql": "SELECT ?pages WHERE {
  ?book rdfs:label ?label ;
        wdt:P304 ?pages .
  FILTER (LANG(?label) = 'en')
  FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(?label), 'mirror and the light'))
  LIMIT 1
}"}
</tool_call>
output.formatted:
<tool_call>
{"name": "execute", "arguments": {"kg": "wikidata", "sparql": "SELECT ?pages WHERE {\n  ?book rdfs:label ?label ;\n        wdt:P304 ?pages .\n  FILTER (LANG(?label) = 'en')\n  FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(?label), 'mirror and the light'))\n  LIMIT 1\n}"}
</tool_call>

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?pages WHERE {
  ?book rdfs:label 'The Mirror & the Light' @en ; wdt:P304 ?pages .
}
```

Execution result:
Got no rows and 1 columns

content.message:
<tool_call>
{"name": "execute", "arguments": {"kg": "wikidata", "sparql": "SELECT ?pages WHERE {
  ?book rdfs:label ?label ;
        wdt:P304 ?pages .
  FILTER (LANG(?label) = 'en')
  FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(?label), 'mirror and the light'))
  LIMIT 1
}"}
</tool_call>
